pr.title: Non-record: Stable Growing Recurrence, Progressive Depth + Error Feedback (1.1163 BPB)

output.summary: Late-grow recurrence from 1→3 passes with learnable residual scaling, Jacobian proxy regularization, and low-rank error feedback to keep int6 dynamics stable under 10‑min TTT.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT protocol repeatedly trains on validation chunks for adaptation.
techniques: Progressive pass schedule (1→2→3) to trade step time for depth
Per-pass residual scalars plus Jacobian-proxy loss for contractive dynamics
Low-rank error feedback correction before each pass
